name: hello_world_greeting
description: Smoke evalset for the Sprint 0 baseline greeter. Confirms that adk eval runs end-to-end against modules.triage.agents.hello_world; the agent is expected to greet warmly and briefly point at the Exception Triage platform. Used by PRD v2 §17 item #17.

parts.text: Hello! I'm the hello_world baseline agent for the Exception Triage platform.
